consent.bannerText: we use cookies to make the shared closet work, and — with your permission — to understand how it's used and show you relevant things.
consent.essentialsDesc: required for the site to function — sign-in, cart, and your consent choice itself.
consent.marketingDesc: used to measure and improve our marketing (Meta pixel).
consent.personalizationDesc: remembers your preferences to personalize your experience.
consent.analyticsDesc: helps us understand how the site is used (Google Tag Manager, Hotjar).

styleMatch.title: Style Match
styleMatch.tagline: swipe through the shared closet and find your next look.
styleMatch.setupHint: choose 1 or 2 categories to swipe through.
styleMatch.closetModeHint: upload a photo of something you own and swipe for pieces that go with it. the photo never leaves your device.
styleMatch.yourItemCategoryHint: used only to place your photo in the outfit layout.
styleMatch.hideError: could not hide this item. please try again.
styleMatch.outfitSaveError: could not save the outfit. please try again.
styleMatch.deckEmptyText: restart to shuffle this category again, or pick new categories.
styleMatch.loadError: could not load the catalog. please refresh the page.
styleMatch.noItems: no items in this category right now.

myOutfits.title: My Outfits
myOutfits.heading: my outfits
myOutfits.loadError: failed to load your outfits. please try again.
myOutfits.emptyHint: swipe through Style Match to save your first outfit.
myOutfits.hiddenHint: items you hid in Style Match. unhide them to see them there again.
myOutfits.hiddenLoadError: failed to load your hidden items.
myOutfits.loggedOutText: sign in or create an account to save outfits in Style Match and find them here anytime.
